candidate_queries.query: ((ti:invariant OR abs:invariant OR ti:"distribution shift" OR abs:"distribution shift" OR ti:"domain generalization" OR abs:"domain generalization") AND (abs:causal OR abs:"invariant prediction" OR abs:"invariant risk minimization") AND (cat:cs.LG OR cat:stat.ML))
((ti:fairness OR abs:fairness OR ti:privacy OR abs:privacy) AND (abs:causal OR ti:causal OR abs:counterfactual)) AND (cat:cs.LG OR cat:stat.ML OR cat:cs.AI)

precision_queries.query: ((ti:"counterfactual fairness" OR abs:"counterfactual fairness" OR ti:"causal fairness" OR abs:"causal fairness"))
